name: NewLife.Redis
description: High performance redis client, support NETCore/. NET4. 0/. NET4. 5. It is specially optimized for big data and message queue. The average daily consumption of online single application is 10 billion. 高性能Redis客户端，支持.NETCore/.NET4.0/.NET4.5，为大数据与消息队列而特别优化，线上单应用日均100亿调用量
